title: AgentOffer OfferProvider Response Schema v0.1
description: Response body returned by a Partner's OfferProvider endpoint. Two shapes are permitted: (a) success envelope { trace_id?, offers, has_more?, total? } and (b) error envelope following the AON ApiResponse contract { code, message, data, extra }. Uses RFC 2119 requirement levels.

SuccessEnvelope.description: Success response envelope. Carried over HTTP 200. offers[] elements SHOULD conform to https://agentoffernetwork.org/schema/offer/v0.1 (offer-schema-v0.1.json).

trace_id.description: Query trace ID. OPTIONAL in Partner responses: AON generates and injects a trace_id at request time; offer-mgmt backfills it on the AON side if Partner omits it. Partners MAY return their own trace_id for log correlation, but AON's value takes precedence.

offers.description: List of offer objects conforming to offer-schema-v0.1.json. MAY be an empty array when no matches are found.

has_more.description: Whether another page is available for the same query.

total.description: Total number of matching offers when available.

ErrorEnvelope.description: Error response envelope aligned with the AON ApiResponse contract. Carried over HTTP 4xx/5xx.

code.description: Business-level error code. MUST be one of the enumerated values; additional codes MAY be introduced in future revisions.

message.description: Human-readable description of the error. MAY be empty when no additional context is available.

data.description: Always an empty object for error responses per the AON ApiResponse contract.

extra.description: Optional diagnostic/extension fields (e.g., retry_after_seconds, debug metadata). Empty object when unused.
